name: Computer Science and Engineering
description: Focuses on the design, development, and analysis of software and hardware systems.

name: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
description: Equips students with the skills to analyze large data streams and design intelligent systems.

name: Information Technology
description: Specializes in application software, information retrieval, networking, and security management.

name: Electronics and Communication Engineering
description: Combines circuit design and communication systems, serving as the bridge to hardware and IoT.

name: Electrical and Electronics Engineering
description: Deals with electricity generation, electrical systems, power electronics, and electrical machinery.

name: Mechanical Engineering
description: The mother branch of engineering, focusing on thermodynamics, machine design, manufacturing, and robotics.

name: Civil Engineering
description: Deals with the design, construction, and maintenance of physical structures like roads, bridges, and buildings.

name: Biomedical Engineering
description: Bridges the gap between engineering and medicine for diagnostic tools, prosthetics, and medical software.

name: Chemical Engineering
description: Applies chemistry, physics, and biology to industrial processes for materials, energy, and chemicals.

name: Biotechnology
description: Utilizes biological systems and organisms to develop healthcare products, agricultural solutions, and drugs.
